item.title: Clickhouse环境搭建和解析
item.author: xpy66swsry@gmail.com (qingci)
item.description: Clickhouse 默认使用docker配置相应的环境: docker run -d --name ck-server --ulimit nofile=262144:262144 -p 9000:9000 -p 8123:8123 -v $HOME/Downloads/ck2_db:/var/lib/clickhouse yandex/clickhouse-server 启动docker docker exec -it ck-server /bin/bash 登录默认的clickhouse clickhouse client
item.dc:creator: qingci

item.title: About
item.author: xpy66swsry@gmail.com (qingci)
item.dc:creator: qingci
